violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to sanitize all dishes and utensils in the sanitizing basin of the 3-bay sink until unit is repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the kitchen space and gnawed insulation in the dining area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to create an action plan and treatment schedule. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in refrigerator. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2026
The mechanical dishwasher located in the kitchen area was observed not properly dispensing sanitizing solution and is not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris; - Inside and outside surfaces of the 1-door freezer - Inside and outside surfaces of the prep unit - Inside and outside surfaces of the 2-door refrigerator - Inside and outside surfaces of the dishwasher - Inside and outside surfaces of the 3-bay sink - Surfaces of the cooktop and oven - Surfaces of the fryolator - Floor and walls of kitchen space Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris; - Inside and outside surfaces of the 1-door freezer - Inside and outside surfaces of the prep unit - Inside and outside surfaces of the 2-door refrigerator - Inside and outside surfaces of the dishwasher - Inside and outside surfaces of the 3-bay sink - Surfaces of the cooktop and oven - Surfaces of the fryolator - Floor and walls of kitchen space Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by knives within the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Knives were removed from sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC was observed pouring liquid bleach into dishwasher prior to cycle in replacement of commercial sanitizing solution. Per PIC, service technician advised PIC to place residential dishwashing liquid and liquid bleach in dishwasher prior to cycle until unit is fixed. Establishment is to use 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, sanitize, and air dry all dishes until unit is fixed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings and gnawed insulation. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following areas have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris; - Inside and outside surfaces of the 1-door freezer - Inside and outside surfaces of the prep unit - Inside and outside surfaces of the 2-door refrigerator - Inside and outside surfaces of the dishwasher - Inside and outside surfaces of the 3-bay sink - Surfaces of the cooktop and oven - Surfaces of the fryolator - Floor and walls of kitchen space Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
